gaps.description: PRD §1.5/§5.5 grep streaming: grepStream works for single files and multi-file non-recursive paths. Recursive (-r) still bypasses streaming and falls back to fs.read()/manual iteration.

PRD §5.3 Performance benchmarks: benchmark test cases exist in test files for grep <500ms (1MB), find <1s (1000 files), ls pagination <100ms. Pass with mock FS but no real filesystem benchmarks are configured.
